notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
CP00-131 is synthetic-only, metadata-only, and Risk A scoped to the Hermes evidence synthetic fixture verdict boundary.
CP00-131 inherits CP130 Hermes evidence synthetic fixture boundary behavior without executing runtime workflows or writing state.
Audit summary and no-real-data receipts remain reference-only and do not emit audit ledger entries, persist fixture data, or mutate permission policy.
Claude dependency markers do not execute Claude review from product runtime, and human approval markers do not grant approval.
PASS, PASS_WITH_FINDINGS, and BLOCK semantics are metadata-only; BLOCK prevents production_ready and PASS_WITH_FINDINGS requires adjudication.
Evidence templates, validation command checks, and harness boundary notes remain inert/reference-only and do not execute commands or invoke Hermes runtime.

No runtime UI/API route, permission policy mutation, product/database write, idempotency persistence, lock acquisition, retry, rollback, compensation, external share/export, AI/analytics execution, LDIP implementation, or HRX split was added.
Unrelated dirty/untracked files were preserved and not included in the active pack.
